items.title: Portfolio Deploy 001
actions_taken: Deployed weareswarm.online portfolio publication + revenue classification surfaces to production. Synced planner JSON (--local-only), then unified_deployer pushed 67 files via Hostinger SFTP. Live surfaces: homepage Dream.OS Is Operational hero, /focus/ Mission Control with consolidation COMPLETE, /projects/ Product outcomes table with Revenue Class column, portfolio_products.json v2 (9 products).

items.title: Closeout Enforcement 001
actions_taken: Implemented closeout enforcement gate blocking task completion until closeout artifact, Discord post, and WeAreSwarm feed entry exist. Wired gate into task_fsm and task_lifecycle_gate. Added policy, verify CLI, and unit tests. Dogfooded the gate for this task.
items.verification: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python -m pytest -q tests/test_closeout_enforcement_gate.py: 6/6 PASS; python runtime/scripts/verify_closeout_enforcement_gate_001.py closeout_enforcement_001: PASSED=True.
items.summary: Implemented closeout enforcement gate blocking task completion until closeout artifact, Discord post, and WeAreSwarm feed entry exist. Wired gate into task_fsm and task_lifecycle_gate. Added policy, verify CLI, and unit tests. Dogfooded the gate for this task.
tasks_completed: Implemented closeout enforcement gate blocking task completion until closeout artifact, Discord post, and WeAreSwarm feed entry exist. Wired gate into task_fsm and task_lifecycle_gate. Added policy, verify CLI, and unit tests. Dogfooded the gate for this task.
